data.body: UPDATE: This was not an isolated incident — the orchestrator skipped completion-verifier on 4 of 5 stories (a367-c19d, b807-5dec, 7dca-6661, dd9e-add0). Only 5cf1-7436 had the verifier run, and only because the user caught the premature closure. The pattern was systematic: after closing all child tasks, the orchestrator went directly to story closure every time. Root cause is not a single oversight but a consistent failure to follow Step 10a.
